title: cadia commersoniana
intro: Cadia commersoniana is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Australia and Southeast Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of limonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Cadia commersoniana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
